name: What is he doing? (Webhook Logger)
description: Discord webhook logger for Geometry Dash.

webhook-url.name: Webhook URL
webhook-url.description: Your Discord webhook URL. Leave empty to disable.

webhook-username.name: Webhook Display Name
webhook-username.description: The webhook's display name. Leave empty to use the default.

test-webhook.name: Send Test Webhook
test-webhook.description: Toggle on and apply changes to send a test webhook.

max-retries.name: Max Webhook Retries
max-retries.description: How many times to retry sending before giving up.

blocking-webhook.name: Blocking Webhook (READ DESCRIPTION)
blocking-webhook.description: Make the webhook HTTP run on the main thread and waits for a response (astronomically worst case it takes up to almost a minute before giving up). Enable this if you really want it to always send when you exit the game. This will be fixed in the next update :frozen:

player-name.name: Player Name
player-name.description: Subject of each Discord message (e.g., 'imes opened Geometry Dash!'). Empty defaults to 'He'.

notify-game-session.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting Geometry Dash
notify-game-session.description: Son, why are you reading this?

notify-play-level.name: Notify on Playing/Exiting a Level
notify-play-level.description: When starting a level (level name, creator, ID) and when exiting a level (includes time in that level).

notify-level-complete.name: Notify on Level Complete
notify-level-complete.description: When a level is completed (includes level info and total time spent on that run).

notify-new-best.name: Notify on New Best
notify-new-best.description: When you get a new best on a level. Hoorayyy!!!!!

notify-editor.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting the Editor
notify-editor.description: When opening the level editor and when exiting the editor. (duh)
